'''Bonaka Nueno''' was a major [[City/Legends|city]] on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Intuci]]. It was the site of a [[Massacre of Bonaka Nueno|massacre]] led by the war criminal [[Gaar (title)|Gaar]] [[Suppoon]] while using the alias [[Suppoon|Sonopo Bomoor]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Jabba the Hutt: The Gaar Suppoon Hit]]'' {{1stm}}
*[[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']] {{Mo}}
